rows.label: qst201403_msg0001
rows.name: Zakuro, I'm impressed you didn't run.

rows.label: qst201403_msg0003
rows.name:
I thought you'd run away,
afraid of how high my
feminine charm is.

rows.label: qst201403_msg0004
rows.name:
You'd better not
underestimate me, Zakuro!

rows.label: qst201403_msg0005
rows.name:
Zakuro, you're the one who
will kneel before my
feminine charm.

rows.label: qst201403_msg0008
rows.name:
By the way... Competing
over feminine charm is fine,
but how do we decide the winner?

rows.label: qst201403_msg0010
rows.name: True... I hadn't thought about that.

rows.label: qst201403_msg0012
rows.name:
We'll call someone else over
and ask them to judge which
of us has more feminine charm.

rows.label: qst201403_msg0013
rows.name:
We'll each tell that person
how much feminine charm
we have...

rows.label: qst201403_msg0014
rows.name:
I see... We both like girl talk,
so that's a good way to judge.

rows.label: qst201403_msg0015
rows.name:
Alright! Let's grab someone
who passes by. Then the
real competition begins!
